docs-governance.observation: [enterprise-policy] OK — canonical workflow decision contract guard passed, R2 enterprise controls enforced

nonBlockingIssues.description: Accounting audit endpoints (audit-trail, audit/transactions, audit/transactions/{journalEntryId}) in accounting-reference-chains.md still lack explicit role annotations, while enterprise audit endpoints document ROLE_ADMIN/ROLE_ACCOUNTING. The ACCOUNTING tag in openapi.json implies access control, but explicit documentation would improve consistency.
ERP-DOD-BIBLE.md still contains 'Open Decisions' headings internally (lines 695, 1296, 1676), but the file-level NON-CANONICAL banner makes this acceptable.
